design_philosophy: High-end cinematic productivity. Inspired by Claude's editorial warmth combined with futuristic glassmorphism and crazy hover effects. Monochromatic deep dark space with bright terracotta/orange accents that glow like a sun.

hierarchy.timer_display: text-6xl sm:text-[8vw] font-mono tracking-tighter font-light text-[#FF5B22] drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,91,34,0.4)]

spacing_and_layout.generous_padding: Use p-6 to p-12 for glass cards. Never cramp elements.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid (Control Room Grid). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-6. Heights must be full to match neighbors.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for glass surfaces. Inner border of 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) to make glass pop.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align most widgets and text. Center align the main stopwatch timer and auth input for focus.

glassmorphism.description: Optical Clarity Glass for cards, headers, and modals.

crazy_hover_effects.tracing_beam_glow: Use Framer Motion to animate a conic gradient border or a blurred orange shadow behind interactive cards on hover.
crazy_hover_effects.magnetic_button: Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain a heavy orange shadow on hover: hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(255,91,34,0.6)] hover:border-[#FF5B22].
crazy_hover_effects.pulse: Active study states or live users should have a slow pulsing orange ring using Tailwind animate-pulse or Framer Motion.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: bg-[#FF5B22] text-white hover:bg-[#FF7347] transition-all. Secondary: Glass button bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-[#FF5B22] hover:text-[#FF5B22].
components.inputs: Shadcn customized. bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-[#F0ECE0] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF5B22]/50 placeholder:text-white/20.
components.calendar: Shadcn calendar for selecting dates. For the heatmap, build a custom CSS grid showing daily study time with intensity mapped to shades of orange.
components.dropdowns: Shadcn Select. Must have glass background, border-white/10, and hover effects matching the theme.
components.cards: Do not use default Shadcn Card. Build custom glass cards using raw HTML/Tailwind with the glassmorphism classes defined above.

image_urls.description: Dark ambient study desk lamp with computer glow

icons.usage: Use thin, minimalist icons. Size 20 or 24. Active state should be tinted orange (#FF5B22).

animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, y 20 -> animate opacity 1, y 0, duration 0.5s.
animations.list_stagger: Framer Motion: staggerChildren 0.1s for study group users and tasks.
animations.timer_active: Subtle breathing animation (scale 1.0 to 1.02) on the timer text or surrounding ring while counting up.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #F0ECE0 on #0A0908 passes APCA/WCAG. Form inputs must have visible focus rings (#FF5B22).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all glowing and pulsing effects.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-timer-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup Framer Motion for the crazy hover effects and page transitions.
Setup Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Figtree', 'JetBrains Mono' via Next.js or index.html.
Build a custom heatmap grid for the calendar study logs using shades of #FF5B22.
For the real-time study groups view, use a Bento grid where each user's card is a glass surface with their live timer. If they are actively studying, give their card an animated orange glow border.
The Stopwatch Timer must be the hero element on the main dashboard, using massive 'JetBrains Mono' font, centered, with an orange drop-shadow.
Username-only Auth screen should have the 'auth_background' image behind a heavy black/blur overlay (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl) with a glowing login input.
